description: HTTP latency deep-dive — p50/p90/p95/p99 per service and endpoint, JVM heap/GC/threads, process CPU, and service health/uptime. Kafka listener and MongoDB latency panels live in chrono-kafka-mongodb.

panels.title: job-producer Uptime

targets.expr: max(process_uptime_seconds{service="job-producer", instance=~"$instance", env=~"$env"})

panels.description: job-producer process uptime. Orange < 5 min (recently restarted), yellow < 1 h, green ≥ 1 h.

panels.title: job-worker Uptime

targets.expr: max(process_uptime_seconds{service="job-worker", instance=~"$instance", env=~"$env"})

panels.description: job-worker process uptime. Orange < 5 min (recently restarted), yellow < 1 h, green ≥ 1 h.

panels.title: job-producer — p99 HTTP

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le) (clamp_min(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_bucket{service="job-producer", uri!~"/actuator.*", instance=~"$instance", env=~"$env"}[$__rate_interval]), 0)))

panels.description: 99th percentile HTTP request latency for job-producer (excluding actuator endpoints).

panels.title: dlq-service — p99 HTTP

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le) (clamp_min(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_bucket{service="dlq-service", uri!~"/actuator.*", instance=~"$instance", env=~"$env"}[$__rate_interval]), 0)))

panels.description: 99th percentile HTTP request latency for dlq-service (excluding actuator endpoints).

panels.title: job-producer Request Rate

targets.expr: sum(clamp_min(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_count{service="job-producer", uri!~"/actuator.*", instance=~"$instance", env=~"$env"}[$__rate_interval]), 0))

panels.description: Current HTTP request throughput (requests/second) for job-producer.

panels.title: Cross-Service HTTP p90 Latency — job-producer & dlq-service

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.90, sum by (le, application) (clamp_min(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_bucket{service=~"job-producer|dlq-service", uri!~"/actuator.*", instance=~"$instance", env=~"$env"}[$__rate_interval]), 0)))

panels.description: Cross-service HTTP p90 latency comparison: job-producer vs dlq-service (excluding actuator endpoints).

panels.title: p95 vs p99 HTTP Latency

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, application) (clamp_min(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_bucket{service=~"job-producer|dlq-service", uri!~"/actuator.*", instance=~"$instance", env=~"$env"}[$__rate_interval]), 0)))

histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le, application) (clamp_min(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_bucket{service=~"job-producer|dlq-service", uri!~"/actuator.*", instance=~"$instance", env=~"$env"}[$__rate_interval]), 0)))

panels.description: Cross-service HTTP latency comparison showing p95 and p99 for job-producer and dlq-service.

panels.title: job-producer — HTTP Latency p50/p90/p95/p99 (all endpoints)

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by (le) (clamp_min(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_bucket{service="job-producer", uri!~"/actuator.*", instance=~"$instance", env=~"$env"}[$__rate_interval]), 0)))
histogram_quantile(0.90, sum by (le) (clamp_min(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_bucket{service="job-producer", uri!~"/actuator.*", instance=~"$instance", env=~"$env"}[$__rate_interval]), 0)))
histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le) (clamp_min(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_bucket{service="job-producer", uri!~"/actuator.*", instance=~"$instance", env=~"$env"}[$__rate_interval]), 0)))
histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le) (clamp_min(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_bucket{service="job-producer", uri!~"/actuator.*", instance=~"$instance", env=~"$env"}[$__rate_interval]), 0)))

panels.description: p50 / p90 / p95 / p99 HTTP request latency for job-producer (all endpoints combined).

panels.title: job-producer — p50/p90/p99 per Endpoint

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by (le, uri) (clamp_min(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_bucket{service="job-producer", uri!~"/actuator.*", instance=~"$instance", env=~"$env"}[$__rate_interval]), 0)))
histogram_quantile(0.90, sum by (le, uri) (clamp_min(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_bucket{service="job-producer", uri!~"/actuator.*", instance=~"$instance", env=~"$env"}[$__rate_interval]), 0)))
histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le, uri) (clamp_min(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_bucket{service="job-producer", uri!~"/actuator.*", instance=~"$instance", env=~"$env"}[$__rate_interval]), 0)))

panels.description: Per-endpoint p50 / p90 / p99 HTTP latency for job-producer.

panels.title: job-producer — Request Rate by Endpoint

targets.expr: sum by (method, uri) (clamp_min(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_count{service="job-producer", uri!~"/actuator.*", instance=~"$instance", env=~"$env"}[$__rate_interval]), 0))

panels.description: HTTP request rate broken down by endpoint and HTTP method for job-producer.

panels.title: job-producer — Status Code Distribution

targets.expr: sum by (status) (clamp_min(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_count{service="job-producer", uri!~"/actuator.*", instance=~"$instance", env=~"$env"}[$__rate_interval]), 0))

panels.description: HTTP response status code distribution for job-producer (bar gauge).

panels.title: dlq-service — HTTP Latency p50/p90/p95/p99

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by (le) (clamp_min(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_bucket{service="dlq-service", uri!~"/actuator.*", instance=~"$instance", env=~"$env"}[$__rate_interval]), 0)))
histogram_quantile(0.90, sum by (le) (clamp_min(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_bucket{service="dlq-service", uri!~"/actuator.*", instance=~"$instance", env=~"$env"}[$__rate_interval]), 0)))
histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le) (clamp_min(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_bucket{service="dlq-service", uri!~"/actuator.*", instance=~"$instance", env=~"$env"}[$__rate_interval]), 0)))
histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le) (clamp_min(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_bucket{service="dlq-service", uri!~"/actuator.*", instance=~"$instance", env=~"$env"}[$__rate_interval]), 0)))

panels.description: p50 / p90 / p95 / p99 HTTP latency for dlq-service (all endpoints combined).

panels.title: dlq-service — p50/p90/p99 per Endpoint

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by (le, uri) (clamp_min(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_bucket{service="dlq-service", uri!~"/actuator.*", instance=~"$instance", env=~"$env"}[$__rate_interval]), 0)))
histogram_quantile(0.90, sum by (le, uri) (clamp_min(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_bucket{service="dlq-service", uri!~"/actuator.*", instance=~"$instance", env=~"$env"}[$__rate_interval]), 0)))
histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le, uri) (clamp_min(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_bucket{service="dlq-service", uri!~"/actuator.*", instance=~"$instance", env=~"$env"}[$__rate_interval]), 0)))

panels.description: Per-endpoint p50 / p90 / p99 HTTP latency for dlq-service.

panels.title: JVM Heap Used — All Services

targets.expr: sum by (application) (jvm_memory_used_bytes{service=~"$service", area="heap", instance=~"$instance", env=~"$env"})

panels.description: JVM heap memory used (bytes) per service.

panels.title: JVM Heap Used % — All Services

targets.expr: clamp_max(clamp_min(100 * sum by (application) (jvm_memory_used_bytes{service=~"$service", area="heap", instance=~"$instance", env=~"$env"}) / clamp_min(sum by (application) (jvm_memory_max_bytes{service=~"$service", area="heap", instance=~"$instance", env=~"$env"}), 1e-9), 0), 100)

panels.description: JVM heap used as a percentage of max heap per service.

panels.title: JVM GC Pause Rate (pauses/s) — All Services

targets.expr: sum by (application) (clamp_min(rate(jvm_gc_pause_seconds_count{service=~"$service", instance=~"$instance", env=~"$env"}[$__rate_interval]), 0))

panels.description: JVM GC pause event rate (pauses per second) per service.

panels.title: JVM GC Pause Latency p99 — All Services

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le, application) (clamp_min(rate(jvm_gc_pause_seconds_bucket{service=~"$service", instance=~"$instance", env=~"$env"}[$__rate_interval]), 0)))

panels.description: p99 JVM GC pause latency per service.

panels.title: JVM GC Pause Latency p95 — All Services

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, application) (clamp_min(rate(jvm_gc_pause_seconds_bucket{service=~"$service", instance=~"$instance", env=~"$env"}[$__rate_interval]), 0)))

panels.description: p95 JVM GC pause latency per service.

panels.title: JVM Live Threads — All Services

targets.expr: jvm_threads_live_threads{service=~"$service", instance=~"$instance", env=~"$env"}

panels.description: JVM live thread count per service.

panels.title: Process CPU Usage — All Services

targets.expr: process_cpu_usage{service=~"$service", instance=~"$instance", env=~"$env"}

panels.description: JVM process CPU usage (0–1 mapped to 0–100 %) per service.

panels.title: System CPU Usage

targets.expr: system_cpu_usage{service=~"$service", instance=~"$instance", env=~"$env"}

panels.description: System CPU usage (0–1 mapped to 0–100 %) per service.

panels.title: CPU Saturation by Service

targets.expr: sum by (application)(rate(process_cpu_seconds_total[$__rate_interval]))

panels.description: CPU time consumption rate by service, useful for spotting saturation and runaway workloads.

panels.title: JVM Non-Heap Memory Used

targets.expr: sum by (application) (jvm_memory_used_bytes{service=~"$service", area="nonheap", instance=~"$instance", env=~"$env"})

panels.description: JVM non-heap memory used (bytes) per service.

panels.title: JVM Classes Loaded

targets.expr: jvm_classes_loaded_classes{service=~"$service", instance=~"$instance", env=~"$env"}

panels.description: JVM loaded classes count per service.

panels.title: JVM Daemon vs Total Threads

targets.expr: jvm_threads_live_threads{service=~"$service", instance=~"$instance", env=~"$env"}
jvm_threads_daemon_threads{service=~"$service", instance=~"$instance", env=~"$env"}

panels.description: JVM daemon and total live thread counts per service.

panels.title: Process Open File Descriptors

targets.expr: process_files_open_files{service=~"$service", instance=~"$instance", env=~"$env"}

panels.description: Process open file descriptor count per service.

title: Chrono Queue — Service Latency & System
